- [✅] Scaffold the Project
  - Created Vite + React + TypeScript project structure
  - Installed all core dependencies (React, Vite, TypeScript)
  - Set up configuration files (vite.config.ts, tsconfig.json)
  - Fixed Node.js PATH and environment setup on Windows

- [✅] Customize the Project
  - Created comprehensive game type system (weapons, units, warbands, factions)
  - Built shared weapon database (basic, special, heavy, melee, thrown weapons)
  - Built shared equipment database (armor, shields, field gear)
  - Implemented 3 sample factions (Adeptus Astartes, Astra Militarum, Adeptus Custodes)
  - Created validation engine (points limits, force organization, keyword synergy checks)
  - Built Army Builder UI component with faction selection, unit management
  - Added real-time point calculation and model counting
  - Implemented export utilities (JSON, Text format, local storage)
  - Fixed all TypeScript compilation errors

- [✅] Install Required Extensions
  - No extensions needed for this project

- [✅] Compile the Project
  - Project builds successfully with `npm run build`
  - Production bundle ready in dist/
  - All modules compile without errors

- [✅] Create and Run Task
  - Dev server running with `npm run dev` at http://localhost:5173
  - Build task configured with `npm run build`
  - Hot module reload (HMR) enabled for development

- [✅] Launch the Project
  - Dev server is running and accessible
  - Army Builder UI is live and functional
  - Real-time validation working

- [✅] Ensure Documentation is Complete
  - README.md created with full project documentation
  - Tech stack documented (React, TypeScript, Vite)
  - Getting started guide included
  - Game features and roadmap explained
  - Installation and build instructions provided
